title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. lithophilum
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. lithophilum, also known as Hieracium lithophilum, is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, a flowering plant in the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. lithophilum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and boost the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. lithophilum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to extract its medicinal compounds and administer them as a remedy.
